The '''''Thunderbolt''''' was a large, state-of-the-art [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Peckhum]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]''
